texto: It's true I live on hope. Why shouldn't I? Every day I see her beauty while you rot in hell. You will tell me that I'm deluded but we are all deluded in some way. The question is which is the best delusion.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Danny Scheinmann que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “It's true I live on hope. Why shouldn't I? Every day I see her beauty while you rot in hell. You …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amor, esperanca, romance, com foco em romance.

texto: But some mistakes can never be righted and the guilt eats away at the soul. Of all the emotions we have, I have learnt that guilt is the most corrosive. Anger passes quickly, and hatred mellows with age and learning, but guilt endures.

texto: What we learn is that the scientist is as important a part of this experiment as the electron, and that the scientist and the electron are in fact connected. This experiment is the cornerstone of the holistic universe theory.

texto: Please hear me, you are not alone on this planet hurtling through space, solitude is an illusion, come let me help you, rise up, walk forward, walk tall, walk straight, let nothing stop you.

texto: What if we changed the story that has been peddled to us over thousands of years by those religions that want to control us, that this life is merely a stepping stone to something better or something worse, and that we can only achieve the better by passing through the doors of their institutions and following their rules? What if we trash this arcane story which has caused so much suffering and hostility, and accept that we have already arrived in heaven and that there is nothing more gorgeous than here and now?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Danny Scheinmann que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “What if we changed the story that has been peddled to us over thousands of years by those religio…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, religion, story, com foco em mudanca e reflexao.
